titleStmt.title: The Ambassador in China ( Stuart ) to the Secretary of State

div.head: The Ambassador in China ( Stuart ) to the Secretary of State
div.p: In suggesting these measures, Embassy has in mind difficulty in continuing to request extension of deadline on the basis that reasonable time not allowed to bring requirements to attention American owners, if active publicity not undertaken when reasonable extensions are obtained.

Embassy would appreciate Department’s comments re foregoing and will not take steps contemplated in (3) and (4) above until Department’s reply received.The course of action suggested was approved by the Department in telegram No. 544, May 8, 5 p.m. (811.5293/5–747).
Foregoing has been discussed with Dr. Bacon who concurs.
